body: Hi Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the co-investment opportunity in [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) — I've had a chance to review their updated deck and I'm fairly impressed with how they've tightened the go-to-market narrative around grid-edge software. Crossbeam is leaning toward participating at the Series A, and given your focus at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) I thought it might make sense to coordinate before we both approach the founders independently. Would you be open to a quick call this week to compare notes on diligence and talk through how our tickets might fit together? I think there's a real opportunity to structure something clean here if we move in the same direction.
